grid.empty: No items yet. Click "+ Add" to create your first bookmark!

pwa.iosInstructions: To install as an app on iPhone or iPad, tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari, and select 'Add to Home Screen'.

tools.title: OmiLink Tools
tools.desc1: Drag the button below to your browser's bookmarks bar.
tools.desc2: Clicking it on any website will instantly save that page to your OmiLink!
tools.hint1: * Note: Make sure your bookmarks bar is visible (Ctrl+Shift+B or Cmd+Shift+B).
tools.hint2: If dragging doesn't work, create a new bookmark manually and paste this code as the URL:

trash.title: Trash
trash.emptyConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all items in the trash? This cannot be undone.
trash.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete '{title}'?

guide.title: OmiLink Guide
guide.tab1Desc: OmiLink allows you to freely arrange your bookmarks and memos.
guide.tab1Li1Desc: Click the ✎ button in the top right header to enter Edit Mode. In Edit Mode, you can drag and drop items to arrange them.
guide.tab1Li2Desc: While in Edit Mode, click the ⋯ menu on any card to edit its details, change its size, or move it to the trash.
guide.tab1Li3Desc: Use the tab bar to create multiple screens. You can move items between tabs using the card menu.
guide.tab2Desc: There are several ways to save links and notes.
guide.tab2Li1Desc: Click the ＋ button at the top right to paste a URL or write a new text memo.
guide.tab2Li2Desc: Open the "OmiLink Tools" from your user profile menu to get a bookmarklet. Click it on any website to save instantly!
guide.tab2Li3Desc: On mobile, you can use the Share (📤) button in your browser and select OmiLink (if installed) to save directly.
guide.tab3Desc: Install OmiLink on your device home screen for a full-screen app experience and easy native sharing.
guide.installed: You are already using the installed App version! 🎉
guide.tab3BrowserInstall: To install, look for the 'Install App' or 'Add to Home Screen' option in your browser menu.
